title: viola adunca f. masonii
intro: Viola adunca f. masonii is a subspecies of the western or early blue violet (Viola adunca), a perennial wildflower native to western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Viola adunca f. masonii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, salves, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
